message.content:
Create the following 3 files for the PortableTestMachine2 WPF project (.NET 8.0, C#). The project is a portable motor CW/CCW current measurement inspection system. All code comments in Korean.

Base path: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\휴대용 검사기\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine2\

Namespace: PortableTestMachine2.Core

## File 1: Core/AppConfig.cs
- Strongly-typed config class with properties:
  - PowerSupplyPort (string, default "COM3")
  - IoBoardPort (string, default "COM4") 
  - AutoVolt (double, default 12.0)
  - AutoCount (int, default 5)
  - AutoStopMode (string, default "CURRENT") — "CURRENT" or "TIME"
  - AutoStopValue (double, default 0.5)
  - ManualVolt (double, default 12.0)
- Static methods: Load() and Save(AppConfig config)
- Uses System.Text.Json with JsonSerializerOptions(WriteIndented = true)
- Config path from PathManager.ConfigFilePath

## File 2: Core/PathManager.cs
- Static class managing all paths
- BaseDir = Path.Combine(Environment.GetFolderPath(SpecialFolder.LocalApplicationData), "PortableTestMachine2")
- ConfigFilePath = BaseDir/config.json
- ExcelDir = BaseDir/Excel/
- LogDir = BaseDir/Log/
- CrashLogPath = BaseDir/crash.log
- Static method EnsureDirectories() that creates all dirs
- Static method GetExcelFileName() returns ExcelDir/yyyy-MM-dd_HH_mm_ss.xlsx

## File 3: Core/Logger.cs
- Simple thread-safe logger
- static void Info(string message), Error(string message, Exception? ex = null)
- Writes to daily log file: LogDir/yyyy-MM-dd.log
- Format: [HH:mm:ss] [INFO/ERROR] message
- Uses lock for thread safety
- static void WriteCrashLog(Exception ex) — appends to crash.log with full stack trace

Write all 3 files now.

content.text: Let me check the existing project structure first.

content.text: Core 디렉토리가 비어 있습니다. 3개 파일을 생성합니다.

3개 파일 생성 완료:

- `Core/PathManager.cs` — 경로 관리 (BaseDir, ConfigFilePath, ExcelDir, LogDir, CrashLogPath, EnsureDirectories, GetExcelFileName)
- `Core/AppConfig.cs` — 설정 클래스 (7개 속성, Load/Save with System.Text.Json)
- `Core/Logger.cs` — 스레드 안전 로거 (Info, Error, WriteCrashLog, lock 기반, 일별 로그 파일)
